rulings.Case Title: CHAN VS AU
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Charge Partner'S Interest And Order Assigning Future Earnings As An Attorney
rulings.Rulings: GRANT ORDER CHARGING DEFENDANT'S KAMMY AU'S INTEREST IN TWO PARTNERSHIPS AND DIRECTING PAYMENT OF MONEY OR PROPERTY OWED TO KAMMY AU TO PLAINTIFF. COURT FURTHER ORDERS 25% OF FUTURE NET INCOME OF PARTNERSHIPS TO BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF. (AA)

rulings.Case Title: SILVESTRI VS CCSF
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO COMMON LAW CAUSES OF ACTION 1ST, 2ND, AND 4TH GRANT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CAL. GOV. CODE LIABILITY PURSUANT TO SECTON 835 DENY. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE NEGLIGENCE OF EMPLOYEES AND NOTICE OF DANGEROUS CONDITION. (AA)

rulings.Case Title: ADAMS VS RAYBESTOS-MANHATTAN INC*
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, DEFT DISMISSED.

rulings.Case Title: POLYAK VS BRAYNIN
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, PER NOTICE OF WITHDRAWAL FILED 8/29.

rulings.Case Title: NEWTON VS CCSF
rulings.Rulings: GRANT AS TO DISCRIMINATION AND RETALIATION CAUSES OF ACTION. NO TIMELY ADVERSE EMPLOYMENT ACTION. CONTINUING VIOLATION DOCTRINE INAPPLICABLE AND PLAINTIFF'S SEPARATE STATEMENT DOES NOT PROPERLY HIGHLIGHT CONDUCT. DENY AS TO FAILURE TO ACCOMMODATE. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXISTENCE OF DISABILITY AND WHETHER DEFENDANT REASONABLY ACCOMMODATED IT. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: WINKLE VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. AY DECLARATION INSUFFICIENT TO CREATE TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. (AA)

rulings.Case Title: RAHMANI VS ASBESTOS DEFT*
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, DEFT DISMISSED.

rulings.Case Title: MENGE VS TANG
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF THE IMPLIED COVENANT, AND THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SECTION 17200, AS IT IS NOT OPPOSED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO THE 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR DISCRIMINATION, AS PLAINTIFF'S DO NOT MEET THEIR BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE OF DISCRIMINATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD, THE 4TH FOR PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL, THE 8TH FOR NEGLIGENCE, AND THE 9TH FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION AS THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: MARY TIMBLIN VS. CYTODYNE TECHNOLOGIES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion To Conduct Discovery
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA KUHL VS. A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: DENY, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. PLAINTIFF'S BROTHER-IN-LAW STATES THAT HE PURCHASED PRODUCTS FROM DEFENDANT AND NO SHOWING THAT PRODUCTS (SUCH AS JOINT COMPOUNDS) DID NOT CONTAIN ASBESTOS. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: PLATH & COMPANY, INC. VS. MT2 NETWORK, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT RE FRAUDULENT INDUCEMENT, OUTSTANDING BALANCE, & INTEREST. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: SCOTT O'CONNOR VS. DENNY RATHEL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue To Los Angeles County
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION ESTABLISHES BASIS FOR VENUE BECAUSE INJURY TO PERSONAL PROPERTY I.E. E-MAIL ACCOUNT IN SAN FRANCISCO. IN ADDITION DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY AS TO RESIDENCE OF DEFENDANT NOT SUFFICIENT. (AS(EX))
